_comment: Frozen payoff-eval set: one representative design per dominant non-bus family where the LEARNED suggest_config override survives the design-type safety clamps (so naive vs learned arms genuinely differ). Bus families (axi/axil/axis) are deliberately excluded: the bus_heavy CORE_UTILIZATION clamp forces CU=15 in BOTH arms, masking the learned difference (a real win would look like a no-op). Keep tiny -- each pair is a full multi-stage flow run per arm (hours). The operator MATERIALIZES each design via init_project + the design's RTL (the design_name listed here is a signoff-clean representative confirmed in the corpus knowledge.sqlite for that family); then runs both arms via tools/batch_flow.sh and finally eval_heuristics.py summarize. CPU-hours/peak-RAM are NOT captured by the current flow instrumentation -- cost is wall-clock seconds (see eval_heuristics.py note).
